executives.name: Dietrich Wanke
executives.background: Mr. Wanke has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held senior management roles at various mining operations globally and is the CEO of European Lithium Ltd.

executives.name: Malcolm Day
executives.background: Mr. Day has over 25 years of experience in the management of publicly listed companies. He is currently the Managing Director of Delecta Limited.

executives.name: Mykhailo Zhernov
executives.background: Mr. Zhernov is the Managing Partner of Millstone & Co, an investment and financial group. He has extensive experience in investment banking and private equity.

executives.name: Tony Sage
executives.background: Mr. Sage has over 35 years of experience in the fields of corporate advisory services, funds management, and capital markets. He is the Executive Chairman of European Lithium Ltd and has served as a director of several ASX-listed companies.
